title: Forgotten East
body:
**Description**

The mod adds a new dungeon encountered in the bamboo jungle and cherry forrest biomes. Adherent, a new mob spawns there, which has several abilities like far leap and projectile deflection with the staff. It could be acquired with a small chance from the mob, or quite rarely from the chest. Player can block with the staff, but doing so sets a cooldown.

Lacquered wood does not burn, but requires lacquer for making. Fire Dragon Trap ignites four blocks in front once powered with redstone. Can be recharged with Lava Bucket. Paper lanterns can be gilded by using a gold ingot on it.
